Function concat_elements_dyn

pub fn concat_elements_dyn(
    left: &dyn Array,
    right: &dyn Array,
) -> Result<Arc<dyn Array>, ArrowError>
Expand description

Returns the elementwise concatenation of Arrays.

ยงErrors

This function errors if the arrays are of different types.
